title: Assistant Store Manager - Titan Company Digital Technologies - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Titan Company Digital Technologies - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Titan Company Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Titan Company Digital Technologies:
Titan Company Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Company Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
